Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Check QCM
with open\('/c/Users/dizzy/Site_Micro/04_bases_donnees_site/qcm.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    qcm = json.load\(f\)
print\(f"QCM: {len\(qcm\)} total questions"\)
qcm_chapters = set\(q['chapitre_id'] for q in qcm\)
print\(f"QCM chapters: {sorted\(qcm_chapters\)}"\)

# Check Flashcards
with open\('/c/Users/dizzy/Site_Micro/04_bases_donnees_site/flashcards.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    flashcards = json.load\(f\)
print\(f"\\nFlashcards: {len\(flashcards\)} total cards"\)
fc_chapters = set\(f['chapitre_id'] for f in flashcards\)
print\(f"Flashcard chapters: {sorted\(fc_chapters\)}"\)

print\("\\nQCM count by chapter:"\)
for ch in sorted\(qcm_chapters\):
    count = len\([q for q in qcm if q['chapitre_id'] == ch]\)
    print\(f"  {ch}: {count}"\)

print\("\\nFlashcard count by chapter:"\)
for ch in sorted\(fc_chapters\):
    count = len\([f for f in flashcards if f['chapitre_id'] == ch]\)
    print\(f"  {ch}: {count}"\)

# Check for inconsistencies
print\(f"\\nChapters in QCM but not in Flashcards: {qcm_chapters - fc_chapters}"\)
print\(f"Chapters in Flashcards but not in QCM: {fc_chapters - qcm_chapters}"\)
EOF)

")
